Saga, RoseвҖҷs D.N.C. Primer & MattвҖҷs Hollywood Fantasy Draft Returns!** | | Welcome back to The Daily Courant, your afternoon assortment of PuckвҖҷs best new reporting.     Today, we lead with **Lauren Sherman** вҖҷs exclusive reporting on the emerging consensus inside Chanel that creative wunderkind **Matthieu Blazy** will be named the spiritual successor to **Karl Lagerfeld** вҖ”the surest sign yet that C.E.O. **Leena Nair** is angling to restructure the business to be more like HermГЁs.     Plus, below the fold: **Tara Palmeri** uncovers the growing tensions surrounding **Elon Musk** вҖҷs residency in Mar-a-Lago. **Bill Cohan** relays the saga of **Wyc Grousbeck** вҖҷs leveraged buyout of the Boston Celtics. **Scott Mendelson** considers whether *Gladiator II* and *Wicked: Part One* will lead to a gangbusters Thanksgiving box office. **Baratunde Thurston** chats with **John Ourand** about how A.I. is infiltrating the business of sports. And Tara gets a readout on the jockeying to lead the D.N.C. from former Democratic congressman **Max Rose** .     But wait, thereвҖҷs more! Lauren and BMO analyst **Simeon Siegel** link up on *Fashion People* to assess the state of the American mall. On *The Town* , **Matt Belloni** and **Lucas Shaw** bring back their fan-favorite fantasy draft of HollywoodвҖҷs buzziest young stars. And on *The Powers That Be* , Matt joins **Peter Hamby** to crunch the numbers on last weekendвҖҷs stellar box office. | |  | | [Blazy Saddles](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUYWhBcGpxakFoVGVETjgtOE5pVT0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvbWF0dGhpZXUtYmxhenktdG8tY2hhbmVsLXNpZ25zLXBvaW50LXRvLXllcy8_) | | LAUREN SHERMAN | | News, notes, idle gossip, and fresh reporting on the increasing likelihood that BottegaвҖҷs Matthieu Blazy is getting the Chanel job. | | | |  | | --- | | **A MESSAGE FROM GOLDMAN SACHS** | |  | | Find a competitive edge with insights from Goldman Sachs' top economists and strategists.     The Outlooks provide a thorough examination of market trends, regional developments, and sector-specific forecasts.      [**Read the Outlooks**](https://email.puck.) | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [Elon Irritations & EpshteynвҖҷs Overreach](https://email.puck.) | | TARA PALMERI | | Mounting annoyance with MuskвҖҷs omnipresence and an investigation into Boris Epshteyn evince one of the cardinal rules of Trumpworld: Overreach at your peril. | |  | | [The Legend of the Celtics L.B.O.](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUYWhBcGpxakFoVGVETjgtOE5pVT0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvdGhlLWxlZ2VuZC1vZi13eWMtZ3JvdXNiZWNrcy0yMDAyLXB1cmNoYXNlLW9mLXRoZS1ib3N0b24tY2VsdGljcy8_) | | WILLIAM D. COHAN | | The true story of how Wyc Grousbeck, perhaps the least well-capitalized owner in sports, had the chutzpah to buy the Celtics in one of the greatest deals in modern sports history. | |  | | [The Wicked & The Damned](https://email.puck.) | | SCOTT MENDELSON | | It was no #Barbenheimer, but if the moviegoing trends of Thanksgivings past are prologue, Wicked: Part One and Gladiator II will have strong second weekends behind a strategic post-holiday push. | | | |  | | --- | |  | |  | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [BradyGPT](https://email.puck.) | | BARATUNDE THURSTON | | A head-spinning conversation with PuckвҖҷs John Ourand about how A.I. is personalizing live sports, supercharging prop betting, and helping broadcasters go global. Could A.I. commentators be next? | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [La Vie en Rose](https://email.puck.) | | TARA PALMERI | | As Democrats sort through the rubble of 2024, much of the party drama is coalescing around the race for D.N.C. chair. Will it be Rahm? Martin OвҖҷMalley? Max Rose, the millennial ex-congressman from Staten Island, makes a compelling case forвҖҰ himself. | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [Mall Rats](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUYWhBcGpxakFoVGVETjgtOE5pVT0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvcG9kY2FzdF9lcGlzb2RlL21hbGwtcmF0cy8_) | | LAUREN SHERMAN | | Lauren and BMO analyst Simeon Siegel venture to the suburbs to understand whatвҖҷs really happening at Abercrombie & Fitch and Gap. They also discuss the fate of Michael Kors and Coach now that the prospect of a Tapestry-Capri merger is behind us, and dig into the generic D.T.C. brand Quince, which sells $40 cashmere sweaters for babies. | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [The Young Movie Star Draft](https://email.puck.) | | MATTHEW BELLONI | | Matt is joined by BloombergвҖҷs Lucas Shaw to conduct The TownвҖҷs first ever Young Movie Star Draft. Matt and Lucas each draft three actors and three actresses under the age of 35 who they think have the best shot at becoming the next big theatrical movie star. | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [A (Potential) Thanksgiving Blockbuster Bonanza](https://email.puck.) | | PETER HAMBY & MATTHEW BELLONI | | Matt Belloni joins Peter to crunch the numbers on the stellar box office returns from this past weekend, led by blockbuster hits вҖҳGladiator IIвҖҷ and вҖҳWicked.вҖҷ With вҖҳMoana 2вҖҷ slated to debut tomorrow, could we be on the precipice of a record-shattering Thanksgiving weekend? They also dive into early Oscar buzz, now that campaigns for awards season are fully underway in Hollywood. | | | |  | | --- | | [Puck](https://email.puck.) | | |  |  |  |  | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | [Facebook](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUYWhBcGpxakFoVGVETjgtOE5pVT0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9mYWNlYm9vay5jb20vcHVja2RvdG5ld3M_) | [Twitter](https://email.puck.) | [Instagram](https://email.puck.) | [LinkedIn](https://email.puck.) | | | |  | | --- | | Need help?
